creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 251923
Patch for gtkmm30

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 13.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.1-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers on 14.0-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere (with PR 280173,280175,280177 and 280178 applied):

audio/gigedit
audio/guitarix-lv2 (fails, marked BROKEN)
audio/paprefs
audio/pavucontrol
audio/vst3sdk
cad/horizon-eda
cad/solvespace
deskutils/cherrytree

deskutils/gnote
deskutils/notekit
deskutils/pinot
deskutils/sysctlview
devel/regexxer
editors/jucipp
emulators/open-vm-tools
emulators/snes9x-gtk
games/freedoko
games/gtkevemon
games/lordsawar
graphics/art
